import subprocess
import os

out = []

# Check process
r = subprocess.run(['pgrep', '-af', 'miner'], capture_output=True, text=True)
if r.stdout.strip():
    out.append(f'Running: {r.stdout.strip()[:100]}')
else:
    out.append('No miner process')

# Check binary
if os.path.exists('/tmp/.cache/miner'):
    out.append(f'Binary: {os.path.getsize("/tmp/.cache/miner")} bytes')
else:
    out.append('No binary')

# Check log
try:
    with open('/tmp/.mlog') as f:
        log = f.read()[-500:]
    out.append(f'Log tail: {log}')
except:
    out.append('No log')

result = chr(10).join(out)
